ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter */,
  "fiscal_quarter_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal quarter */,
  "fiscal_quarter_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula for calculating the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula for calculating the KPI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., viewed financial statement, edited financial statement) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "forecast_data" TEXT /* Forecast data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the budget */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "budget_data" TEXT /* Budget data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_plans" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the scenario plan */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "scenario_data" TEXT /* Scenario plan data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_plans_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_plans_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_plans_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
